titles.en: Chapter 33 – Different Arguments upon Hisazwj servants
Chapter 33 – Different Arguments upon Hisazwj servants

segments: سِتَّةُ أَشْيَاءَ لَيْسَ لِلْعِبَادِ فِيهَا صُنْعٌ الْمَعْرِفَةُ وَ الْجَهْلُ وَ الرِّضَا وَ الْغَضَبُ وَ النَّوْمُ وَ الْيَقَظَةُ .
arabic.text: سِتَّةُ أَشْيَاءَ لَيْسَ لِلْعِبَادِ فِيهَا صُنْعٌ الْمَعْرِفَةُ وَ الْجَهْلُ وَ الرِّضَا وَ الْغَضَبُ وَ النَّوْمُ وَ الْيَقَظَةُ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ali Bin Asbat, from Al Husayn Bin Zayd, from Dorost Bin Abu Mansour, from the one who narrated it,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Six things, there isn’t a the servants to play a role with regards to these – The recognition, and the ignorance, and the pleasure, and the anger, and the sleep, and the waking up (from the sleep)’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ali Bin Asbat, from Al Husayn Bin Zayd, from Dorost Bin Abu Mansour, from the one who narrated it,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Six things, there isn’t a the servants to play a role with regards to these – The recognition, and the ignorance, and the pleasure, and the anger, and the sleep, and the waking up (from the sleep)’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ سَهْلِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَسْبَاطٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ زَيْدٍ عَنْ دُرُسْتَ بْنِ أَبِي مَنْصُورٍ عَمَّنْ حَدَّثَهُ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

parts.text: دُرُسْتَ بْنِ أَبِي مَنْصُورٍ عَمَّنْ حَدَّثَهُ
